<!-- Thanks for the PR! A short description here helps the maintainer
     review faster. Most of these can be filled in 1-2 sentences. -->

## What

<!-- What does this change do? -->

## Why

<!-- What problem does it solve / what use case does it unlock? -->

## How (if non-obvious)

<!-- Implementation notes — only if the diff doesn't explain itself.
     Skip for trivial changes. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] An issue was opened first for non-trivial changes (or the change
      is small enough to skip that step).
- [ ] CI is green (`ruff`, `pytest`, `yamllint`, `gitleaks`).
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed (`docs/PIPELINE.md` + PT/ES
      siblings, `docs/STYLE.md`, READMEs, etc.).
- [ ] Commit messages follow `feat(scope): …` / `fix(scope): …` style.
- [ ] No secrets, no `memory/` content, no `CLAUDE.md` in the diff.
